// about me

Who I Am

I'm Madusanka Gamage — a Designer, Machine Operator, and Advertising Engineer with over 8 years of hands-on experience in the advertising and marketing industry.

Since 2016, I've been working with diverse clients to bring creative visions to life — from concept design through to large-format digital printing, CNC cutting, LED sign production, and final on-site installation.

Currently based in Sri Lanka, I hold a German A1 certificate and am actively pursuing B2 — with a strong goal of bringing my expertise to Germany and the EU.

💡
LED & Illuminated Signage
Full design and production of LED sign boards, illuminated lettering, and plastic embossing systems
🖨️
Large Format Digital Print
Roland & HP wide-format operation, artwork preparation, outdoor and indoor print production
⚙️
CNC & Laser Cutting
CNC router and laser cutting machine operation for precision sign and display production
🎨
Graphic & Brand Design
Brand identity, advertising layouts, signage graphics and digital marketing content
